hero.title: Your Gateway to Government Services
hero.subtitle: Submit requests, track applications, and get timely resolutions — all in one place.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Fill out a simple form describing your issue with the relevant department.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your complaint is reviewed and assigned to the appropriate officer.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Monitor real-time updates and communicate with the assigned officer.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive notification when your issue is resolved. Download receipt for records.

services.title: Services Available
services.subtitle: Access a wide range of civic utility services through our unified platform.
services.electricityDesc: Power outages, billing issues, new connections
services.waterDesc: Water quality, supply disruptions, new connections
services.gasDesc: Gas leaks, billing, new pipeline connections
services.otherDesc: General civic issues and miscellaneous requests

tracking.title: Track Your Application
tracking.subtitle: Enter your ticket ID to check the current status of your complaint.
tracking.notFound: No complaint found with this ticket ID.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I submit a complaint?
faq.a1: Register as a citizen, log in, and use the 'Submit Complaint' option from your dashboard. Fill in the details and attach any supporting documents.
faq.a2: Resolution time varies by department and issue complexity. You can track real-time progress using your ticket ID.
faq.q3: Can I track without logging in?
faq.a3: Yes! Use the 'Track Application' feature on the homepage with your ticket ID to check status without logging in.
faq.a4: We cover Electricity, Water Supply, Gas Services, Waste Management, Municipal Corporation, and more.

footer.description: Unified platform for all civic utility services. Submit requests, track applications, and stay updated.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Unified Citizen Services Portal. All rights reserved. Government of Country.
